# Self-Attention and the Transformer {#sec-14-self-attention-transformer}

::: {.callout-warning}
**Chapter stub.** This chapter is planned but not yet written. The abstract below is its
contract; drafting sources are listed for provenance.
:::

*Let a sequence attend to itself and recurrence becomes optional. Positional encodings as rotations, multi-head subspaces, LayerNorm and residuals, the FFN as associative memory — the full block, built and trained.*

<!-- draft-sources
seeds:
- `sources/9.1-self-attention.tex`
- `sources/9.A.1-positional_encoding.tex`
- `sources/9.1A-Normalization_in_Transformers.tex`
transcripts:
- `m09_lecture-9-transformer_N4ePLi42ADk.txt`
- `[coding]_m09_lecture-9-2-transformer-part-2_tG8b2eNm6Gg.txt`
-->
